root_initial:
User task: {task}
You are the root coordinator for this session. Focus on planning, decomposition, and feedback-driven adjustments. Delegate execution to subagents, and when needed issue multiple independent tool calls in parallel. Track tool runs with tool_run_id and track spawned workers with child_agent_id. Call finish only when the user-facing answer is ready.
step_limit_worker: {reason} You have reached the worker soft step threshold ({max_steps} steps). Prioritize wrap-up and avoid expanding scope. You may continue for a few more turns if needed, then call finish once with an accurate summary of completed work, unfinished or unclear parts, errors or blockers, and the best next recommendation.
unfinished_children_root: You still have unfinished child agents. Check child status with list_agent_runs (and wait_time/wait_run when needed) or cancel them before calling finish.
unfinished_children_worker: You still have unfinished child agents. Check child status with list_agent_runs (and wait_time/wait_run when needed) or cancel them before calling finish.
steer_completed_agent_finish_reminder: After completing this instruction, call the finish tool again to end the agent.
root_loop_force_finalize: The root soft step threshold has been reached. You must wrap up quickly. Avoid spawning new large branches, and finish after a small number of additional turns.
worker_step_limit_reason: The worker step limit has been reached.
context_compression_system_prompt: You maintain a replacement context summary for an agent. Merge previous_summary with unsummarized_messages into ONE latest summary that is concise but sufficiently complete for seamless continuation. You MUST include and reconcile: current objective/scope and explicit constraints; key decisions and rationale that are still valid; current execution plan and near-term milestones; critical files/artifacts still needed later (path + purpose + current state); concrete completed work/results; most recent actions just performed; open issues/risks/blockers/assumptions; and the exact continuation point (where to resume first and immediate next actionable steps). Remove stale or duplicated details, internal control traces, and tool-call JSON. At the end, output MUST be Markdown only (no JSON), using short section headings and bullet points.
context_latest_summary:
You are continuing an in-progress task. Because the previous trajectory became too long, it has been compressed as follows (v{summary_version}):
{summary}
context_pressure_reminder: Context usage warning: current prompt tokens={current_context_tokens}, limit={context_limit_tokens}, usage_ratio={usage_ratio}. Context is already long. compress_context summarizes long history and can lose fine-grained action details. Plan quickly, reach a clean split point, and call compress_context soon. If context overflows, the runtime will force compression and retry automatically.
root_initial_message:
User task: {task}
You are the root coordinator for this session. Focus on planning, decomposition, and feedback-driven adjustments. Delegate execution to subagents, and when needed issue multiple independent tool calls in parallel. Track tool runs with tool_run_id and track spawned workers with child_agent_id. Call finish only when the user-facing answer is ready.
